---
image: website-photo.jpg
about:
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15rem
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/tselmena
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tselmen-anuurad/
---

## Hello there! 

I’m Tselmen Anuurad, though I usually go by Tsel (pronounced like "cell"). I am currently a senior at the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA), where I’ll graduate in June 2026 with a B.S. in Statistics and Data Science. 

I am very excited about the intersection of statistics and medicine. Following graduation, I plan to pursue a PhD in Biostatistics to further my research in **clinical trials**, **longitudinal and survival analysis**, and **causal inference**. I am particularly interested in applying these methods to **neurodegenerative diseases** to develop impactful, real-world public health solutions :)
